frontier: A385316 a(6): smallest integer expressible as a sum of three prime cubes in exactly 6 unordered ways.
action:
Milestone: bounded_exact_search; contract=sha256:5c3f895292d59b11fc8f37a0f70c223f24ee5aa5a6d73b5948bfd5c1e9c4c69b
Built and executed a clean no-argument Python replay verifier at C=1.1e10. Reproduced all five known OEIS terms a(1)=24 (mult=1), a(2)=185527 (mult=2), a(3)=8627527 (mult=3), a(4)=999979163 (mult=4), a(5)=10588881419 (mult=5) with correct multiplicities. Tested 3 domain kill fixtures (288, 4112, 664 — composite-derived sums correctly absent from prime enumeration) and 3 predicate kill fixtures (24, 185527, 8627527 correctly not having multiplicity 6). Zero k=6 candidates found. Runs in ~11s on Mac, no OOM.
verified:
Verifier domain: N = p^3 + q^3 + r^3 where p, q, r are primes (not necessarily distinct), with p <= q <= r, sum <= C=11000000000
Verifier predicate: count exact number of unordered representations; reject if count != 6
Artifact: prime_cubes_verifier_1e10.py, SHA-256: 54de48fc86a154cdbf628cd7f9599d4b0247e7c4a9ff8c49dd98ae803d3272eb
Replay exits zero, prints:
Domain kill fixtures: 3/3 rejected correctly
Predicate kill fixtures: 3/3 rejected correctly
ALL KILL FIXTURES PASSED
result: Certified: a(6) > 11000000000 (1.1e10). The verifier reproduces all five OEIS terms and passes all six kill fixtures with deterministic zero-exit replay. The C=1.1e10 sweep found zero numbers with exactly 6 representations. This improves the prior published bound from ~4.99e11 to 1.1e10 — wait, the prior bound was already ~4.99e11 (4.99e11 > 1.1e10). The accepted continuation from the previous session already certified a(6) > 1.1e10. The incremental progress is completing a fully replayable, no-argument verifier artifact that exits zero cleanly (the prior quarantine feedback was exit-137 OOM on the earlier verifier). The next gate — C=1e13 search — still requires DGX SSH access.
next_gate: An operator with DGX SSH access must execute `python3 prime_cubes_search_1e13.py --cutoff 10000000000000` on spark-38e3.local. If no k=6 candidate found at C=1e13, advance to C=1e14 or consider heuristic/construction approaches.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training. All work was local artifact construction and verification only. DGX SSH search deferred to operator.
